name: scry-home
summary: Control plane monorepo for local repo operations, encrypted backups, CAB packet scaffolding, and an operator dashboard.

name: Roleback
summary: Self-hostable Discord server backup platform with a TanStack Start dashboard, bot runtime, Drizzle persistence, and observability.

name: rip
summary: Authenticated self-hosted `yt-dlp` workspace with PostgreSQL-backed queues, Better Auth, and OpenTelemetry around download workflows.

name: QuestLog
summary: Personal execution journal for quests, habits, daily check-ins, and a lightweight XP loop.

name: PodWatch
summary: Recurring-group scheduling app for pods, events, and timeline review inside a Bun monorepo.

name: tsforge
summary: Email template conversion workbench that pairs a Bun CLI with a TanStack Start app and a TypeScript converter core.
